body:
Integrated the roguelike PvE mode with the backend Socket.io state machine. Game logic is now fully server-driven; MongoDB handles persistence via REST API.
Added：
- RogueRun.js — Mongoose model for run progress, checkpoints, and skill cooldowns
- rogue.js — Full REST API for run lifecycle (start, save, checkpoint, floor-won/lost, enhancement, abandon)
- rogueapi.js — Frontend API client for all rogue endpoints
- useRogueLikeLogic.js — Rewrote hook to be Socket.io driven; handles layer advancement, floor retry via checkpoint restore, and auto-save
- RogueGamePage.jsx — Updated page to initialise/resume runs and handle win/loss flows
- Socket events advanceLayer and restoreFromCheckpoint added to pveHandlers.ts

Fixed：
- Shield cooldown was permanently broken after being shattered; now uses a 2-round countdown (tickShieldCooldown) that correctly resets
- cooldownRounds field added to ShieldState and propagated through state machine, store, and adapter

comments.body:
09/05 second git Fix: Backend Changes

backend/src/index.ts

- Mounted the /api/rogue route

backend/src/types/state.ts

- Added a `cooldownRounds: number` field to the ShieldState interface; the createShieldState factory function initializes it to 0 synchronously.

backend/src/lib/skills.ts
Fixed a bug where shields were permanently unusable after being broken:

- Set `cooldownRounds: 2` after shatterShield breaks (previously only a boolean value, no turn countdown)

- Added `tickShieldCooldown`: decrements the cooldown count at the end of each turn, automatically clearing the cooldown state when it reaches zero.

- Fixed `resetShieldCooldown` to completely reset it to zero.

backend/src/pve/actions.ts
Fixed two bugs:

- Hand card update bug: `doResolveComplete` now calls `playCards` to move played cards into the discard pile and replenish the deck to 7 cards. Previously, once a card was played, it remained in your hand, and your hand size never changed.

- Shield cooldown not counting down bug: `doRoundEndConfirm` should now call `tickShieldCooldown`. Previously, directly passing through the shield state caused the cooldown to never reset.

backend/src/utils/pveHandlers.ts
Four changes:

- The emit() function explicitly passes the cooldownRounds field, allowing the front end to correctly display the remaining shield cooldown rounds.

- Added restoreFromCheckpoint Socket event: When a player fails and reloads, the game room state is directly rebuilt using checkpoint data, eliminating the need for reconnection.

- Added advanceLayer Socket event: After completing a layer, progressing to the next layer, rebuilding the Boss's stats, restoring the player's health to full, and resuming the shield cooldown countdown across layers.

Introduced updateRoom and createBossForLayer dependencies to support these two events.

Frontend changes

- Tracking the actual number of cleared layers using winLayerRef to avoid React rendering timing issues causing accidental triggering of the victory screen.

- Complete handling of the victory/failure/retry/give up process.

frontend/src/components/game/Enhancement.jsx
Fixed two issues with the buff selection pop-up:

- Added attribute icon matching for the opt.element field (previously only checking...) (The `opt.color` setting caused all level 1 gain icons to display the default lightning bolt.)

- Fixed an issue where corrupted file encoding caused the `WATER/FIRE/GRASS` key in `runeConfig` to mismatch.

`frontend/src/store/pveSocketStore.js`

- Added `cooldownRounds: 0` to the initial shield state.

`frontend/src/socket/pveSocketAdapter.js`

- Added `cooldownRounds: 0` to the default shield value to ensure correct data transmission from the server.

`frontend/src/router/index.jsx` Registers the `/rogue` route, protected by `PrivateRoute`, requiring login for access.

`frontend/index.html`

- Included the Cinzel font from Google Fonts for the title text of the gain selection popup.

`frontend/vite.config.js`

- `frontend/public/images/cardbackground.png` (New) Card background image resource for the gain selection popup.

title: feat: roguelike mode - socket state machine integration
